temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A woman with voluminous, curly blonde hair and a dark cardigan speaks animatedly to a man. The man, seen from behind, wears a plaid shirt. They are seated at a table in a busy diner, with other patrons and staff visible in the background. (Storyline: The scene opens on a conversation between a man and a woman in a diner. The woman is making a point, gesturing with her hands, while the man listens.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Conversational, slightly insistent. 2) Background sounds or music: The low hum of diner chatter and clinking dishes.)
(00:03-00:05) The camera angle widens to show both characters at their table. The woman looks at the man, who is eating a sandwich. A sign in the background reads 'SODA 80¢'. The man seems to be responding to her. (Storyline: The man begins to respond to the woman's statement, questioning her assumption. The wider shot establishes the setting more clearly.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Questioning, slightly defensive. 2) Background sounds or music: Continued ambient diner noise.)
